description: §41.14.4 — a <slot name="X"> inside <formFor for=T> whose X matches neither a declared struct field of T nor the reserved "submit" slot fires E-FORMFOR-SLOT-UNKNOWN. Signup has { name, email, agree }; slot name="nope" names a non-field.
rationale: §41.14.4: a slot whose name= does not match any struct field (or the reserved "submit" slot) SHALL emit E-FORMFOR-SLOT-UNKNOWN.
